sections.heading: About Glenn Salkeld Painting
body: Glenn Salkeld Painting is an owner-operated painting business based in Graton and serving Sebastopol and west Sonoma County. Glenn handles jobs personally, helping homeowners choose colors and finishes and treating each house with the kind of care that comes from doing the work himself.

Customers single out the thorough preparation — sanding and sealing every gap, crack and flaw before a brush touches the wall — along with daily cleanup and fair pricing. The business is a licensed California Painting and Decorating (C-33) contractor, license #699134.
highlights: Serving Sebastopol, Graton & west Sonoma County

items.quote: Great color suggestions and fantastic prep — sanding and sealing every gap, crack and flaw, with daily cleanup and fair pricing.
